summary: Iteration 51: Amazon Historical Order Sync feature fully verified. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Amazon History tab with count (57), date picker (default 01 Apr 2026), Fetch History button, Process in CRM dialog with required customer fields, no Push to Amazon for history orders.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: fetch_amazon_orders (server.py ~20196): Correctly accepts created_after_date parameter in YYYY-MM-DD format
list_amazon_orders (server.py ~20387): Returns amazon_shipped count in stats correctly
update_amazon_tracking (server.py ~20485): Properly handles is_history_order flag, requires customer details for history orders
Frontend AmazonOrders.jsx: Amazon History tab filters by crm_status='amazon_shipped', Process in CRM button only shows for history orders
Frontend dialog correctly shows 'Process in CRM' button instead of 'Push to Amazon' for history orders
pending_fulfillment entries include is_history_order=true flag for tracking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Amazon Historical Order Sync feature verified working: 1) Amazon History tab shows orders with crm_status='amazon_shipped' (57 orders), 2) Date picker defaults to April 1, 2026, 3) Fetch History button calls fetch-orders with created_after_date and order_status=Shipped, 4) Process in CRM button opens dialog with customer details fields (name, phone, city, state, pincode), 5) History orders do NOT show 'Push to Amazon' option, 6) Processing history order moves it to 'tracking_added' status and creates pending_fulfillment entry with is_history_order=true.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/amazon/orders/{firm_id}: PASS - Returns orders with amazon_shipped stat
Backend API Tests.GET /api/pending-fulfillment: PASS - Returns entries with is_history_order field

Frontend UI Tests.Amazon History Orders List: PASS - Shows orders with 'Amazon Shipped' status
Frontend UI Tests.Customer Details Fields: PASS - Name, Phone, City, State, Pincode present
Frontend UI Tests.History Order Badge: PASS - Shows 'Amazon History' badge in dialog
Frontend UI Tests.No Push to Amazon: PASS - History orders don't show Push to Amazon option

amazon_history_feature_summary.history_order_flow: amazon_shipped -> tracking_added (via Process in CRM) -> pending_fulfillment queue
